researchQuestion: How did the cardiovascular disease burden in China compare with the global burden from 1990 to 2023 in GBD 2023?
targetStatement: This descriptive GBD analysis will compare cardiovascular disease deaths and DALYs for China and the global population using all-age counts and age-standardized rates after a matching GBD export is verified.
scopeBoundary: Targeted scaffold only until source exports and provenance exist. Do not infer causality, mechanisms, clinical diagnoses, intervention effects, or policy effects from modeled GBD estimates.

claimDispositionPolicy.pending-export: Claim skeleton is allowed for study design but must not appear as a numeric manuscript result until source rows, derived outputs, and provenance exist.
claimDispositionPolicy.candidate-manuscript-claim: May be drafted only after export-backed source fields, UI, citation, reuse, and query-profile gates pass.
claimDispositionPolicy.submission-ready: Allowed only after strict submission gate and human citation/reuse review pass.

claims.expectedText: cardiovascular disease burden in China compared with the global burden from 1990 to 2023
claims.interpretationBoundary: Descriptive disease-burden scope only; no causal, clinical, mechanism, or policy-effect claims.

claims.metricBoundary: Number estimate only; do not describe as rate or age-standardized.
claims.interpretationBoundary: Source-backed descriptive GBD candidate claim; final citation, reuse, journal wording, and strict submission gate still required.

claims.metricBoundary: Number estimate only; do not describe as rate or age-standardized.
claims.interpretationBoundary: Source-backed descriptive GBD candidate claim; final citation, reuse, journal wording, and strict submission gate still required.

claims.expectedText: The age-standardized CVD death rate changed from 496.65 (UI 420.03-571.17) to 208.03 (UI 178.08-233.08) in China and from 375.51 (UI 346.66-401.06) to 214.94 (UI 194.23-229.57) globally.
claims.metricBoundary: Age-standardized rate only; keep separate from all-age count claims.
claims.interpretationBoundary: Source-backed descriptive GBD candidate claim; final citation, reuse, journal wording, and strict submission gate still required.

claims.expectedText: The age-standardized CVD DALY rate changed from 10065.67 (UI 8607.08-11541.62) to 4059.34 (UI 3593.00-4444.04) in China and from 8061.62 (UI 7403.37-8632.63) to 4863.82 (UI 4460.87-5192.31) globally.
claims.metricBoundary: Age-standardized rate only; keep separate from all-age count claims.
claims.interpretationBoundary: Source-backed descriptive GBD candidate claim; final citation, reuse, journal wording, and strict submission gate still required.
